data.title: 🎉✨ It's a wrap for the SPARK: General Virtual Assistance (GVA) Program in Tangub City! ✨🎉
🏛️💻 Smarter Systems. Faster Service. Better Governance.
data.description:
We officially wrapped up the 3-day eLGU Building Permit & Certificate of Occupancy Training for LGU Clarin, Misamis Occidental (June 22–24, 2026)!

By mastering the eLGU digital system, Clarin’s frontline personnel are now equipped to streamline permits, cut wait times, and elevate local public service standards.

The goal: Transparent, reliable, and digital-first governance for every citizen.

#eLGU #DICT #DigitalBayanihan #BagongPilipinas #GoodVibesLang
